# Diners Club Miles Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits. 
![Diners Club Miles Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/diners-club-miles-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Diners Club Miles Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you

## Benefits and Features
Lifestyle benefits
  * 4 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent, redeem them for flight tickets and hotel stays, and cover up to 70% of purchase value.
  * 15% discount at premium restaurants and 1400+ dining offers globally.
  * 6 complimentary lounge access annually and access to concierge services.
  * Earn 1 mile per Reward Point and use them for flight and hotel bookings


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-miles-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Miles Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/shopping-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
Banking Benefits
  * Chip-enabled card for secure transactions
  * Credit liability cover up to ₹9 lakh


![Diners Club Miles Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Insurance Benefits
  * Emergency medical expenses cover up to ₹25 lakh
  * Travel insurance for baggage delay/loss up to ₹50,000
  * Air accident cover up to ₹1 crore


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-miles-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Miles Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Card Management & Controls
Single Interface
  * One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 


Spends tracking
  * Simple interface to track all your spends 


Reward Points
  * View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Card Reward & Redemption Program
  4. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  MyCards 
  * MyCards, a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Diners Club Miles Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.  
  

    * Credit Card Registration and Activation 
    * Set up your Card PIN 
    * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions 
    * View Transactions / Download e-Statements 
    * Check Reward Points 
    * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-key-features-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * **Joining/renewal membership fee** : ₹1,000 plus applicable taxes.
  * ****Cash Advance Fee** :** 2.5% fee, minimum ₹500, on all cash withdrawals.
  * ****Interest:** **3.6% per month on outstanding amounts past the due date.
  * ****Renewal fee waiver** **on spending ₹1lakh or more in a year.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-miles-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of the Diners Club Miles Credit Card fees and charges.


![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-key-features-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Card Reward & Redemption Program 
  * **Redemption Value:**  
  

    * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/diners) or Netbanking. 
    * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at:   
| 1 Reward Point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹0.50  |  
| Airmiles conversion  | 1.0 airmile  |  
| Products Catalogue  | up to ₹0.35  |  
| CashBack  | up to ₹0.20  |  
**Redemption Limit:**
    * Reward Points can be redeemed up to 70% of the booking value for Flights and Hotel booking. The remaining amount will have to be paid via Credit Card.
    * Reward points earned are capped at 50,000 in a statement cycle.
    * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for further details on the process to redeem Reward Points


![Card Reward and Redemption Program ](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-miles-credit-card/terms-and-conditions.pdf) for each of our banking offerings feature all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What is the Diners Club Miles Credit Card?
HDFC Bank’s Diners Club Miles Credit Card is a premium Credit Card that offers exclusive rewards, benefits, and privileges to cardholders. With this card, you can earn reward points on your spends, enjoy complimentary lounge access, and avail of comprehensive insurance coverage.
### 
How to apply for an HDFC Bank Diners Club Miles Credit Card? 
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Miles Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
### 
What is the credit limit for Diners Club Miles Credit Card?
The credit limit for the Diners Miles Club Credit Card is determined by factors such as income, credit history, and internal policies. The exact limit will be communicated upon card approval.
